mapper.select:
select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.password, u.status, u.del_flag from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.del_flag = '0'
and (lower(u.user_name) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(u.nick_name) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(u.email) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%'))
and r.role_key = #{roleKey}
order by u.user_id
select user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, email, phonenumber, sex, password, status, del_flag from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0'
select user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, email, phonenumber, sex, password, status, del_flag from sys_user where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (user_name, nick_name, email, phonenumber, sex, password, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values (#{userName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{phonenumber}, coalesce(#{sex}, '2'), #{password}, coalesce(#{status}, '0'), '0', #{createBy}, now())
insert into sys_user_role (user_id, role_id) select #{userId}, role_id from sys_role where role_key = #{roleKey} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update sys_user set nick_name = #{nickName}, email = #{email}, phonenumber = #{phonenumber}, sex = #{sex}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set nick_name = #{nickName}, email = #{email}, phonenumber = #{phonenumber}, sex = #{sex}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user where email = #{email} and user_id != #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
